citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
An APHIS official observed a supplement (Bene-Bac Plus) in the food preparation area that was expired (best-by-date
April 2025). According to a facility representative, this supplement had been administered to the two North American river
otters past its expiration date. Use of expired supplements does not constitute the standard of care as they may not be
safe or effective. The facility must ensure that that it maintains a program of adequate veterinary care that includes the
use of appropriate methods to prevent, control, diagnose, and treat diseases and injuries. Correct by June 2, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.40(b)(2) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
An APHIS official observed a supplement (Bene-Bac Plus) in the food preparation area that was expired (best-by-date 
April 2025). According to a facility representative, this supplement had been administered to the two North American river 
otters past its expiration date. Use of expired supplements does not constitute the standard of care as they may not be 
safe or effective. The facility must ensure that that it maintains a program of adequate veterinary care that includes the 
use of appropriate methods to prevent, control, diagnose, and treat diseases and injuries. Correct by June 2, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
